title: ESWD Severe Weather Events Scraper Input

timeAmount.title: Time Range Amount
timeAmount.description: How many time units to look back for events. Combined with Time Range Unit (e.g., 2 days = last 48 hours of events).

timeUnit.title: Time Range Unit
timeUnit.description: The time unit for the lookback period.

eventTypes.title: Event Types
eventTypes.description: Filter results by weather event type. Leave empty to include all event types.

countries.title: Countries
countries.description: Filter by two-letter ISO country code (e.g., 'DE' for Germany, 'FR' for France, 'IT' for Italy). Leave empty for all countries.

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of events to save. Set to 0 for unlimited.

includeDeleted.title: Include Deleted Events
includeDeleted.description: Whether to include events that have been deleted from the ESWD database.

rawPayload.title: Raw Payload (Advanced)
rawPayload.description: Optional base64-encoded raw ESWD API payload. Use this to override all other input fields for advanced filter configurations. Leave empty to use the fields above.
